title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE HIGH SCHOOL LOCATED WITHIN THE CAMPUS OF THE MAGALLANES SCHOOL OF FISHERIES TO BARANGAY CENTRO, MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALLANES, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AND CHANGING ITS NAME TO MAGALLANES NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5998 / 97 OG No. 12, 55 Supp. (Mar. 19, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8966, September 20, 2000 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE HIGH SCHOOL LOCATED WITHIN THE CAMPUS OF THE MAGALLANES SCHOOL OF FISHERIES TO BARANGAY CENTRO, MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALLANES, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AND CHANGING ITS NAME TO MAGALLANES NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The high school within the campus of the Magallanes School of Fisheries is hereby transferred to Barangay Centro, Municipality of Magallanes, Province of Sorsogon and its name changed to Magallanes National High School.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. The Department of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue the necessary rules and regulations for the effective implementation of this Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

originated

in

the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 27, 2000

and May 22, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of
